sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111060" key="filoba/rbaros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-βάρβᾰρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111060.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of barbarians</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">foreigners,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.857a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
